news.title: Bitdeer (BTDR) Signs Major Norway AI Data Center Lease As Business Focus Shifts
news.summary: Bitdeer Technologies Group (NasdaqCM:BTDR) has signed a major colocation lease for its Tydal, Norway AI data center. The facility is planned as one of Europe's largest AI data centers by installed capacity and is designed for Nvidia's Vera Rubin platform. The agreement marks a key step in Bitdeer's move from Bitcoin mining toward a focused hyperscale AI infrastructure business.
